reply_original:
Hi there! Thank you for the 4-star rating. I'm sorry to hear that while you find Fantasia interesting, some parts aren't meeting your expectations. 

We really want to make it "good" for you! Could you please tell us what specifically needs improvement?
reply_zh:
你好！感谢你的四星好评。很遗憾听到虽然你觉得 Fantasia 很有趣，但有些部分未能达到你的预期。

我们非常希望为你打造“优秀”的体验！能否请你告诉我们具体有哪些地方需要改进？
